name: Caribou Marinade III- Rosemary & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the water, peppercorns, onion quarters, rosemary leaves, red wine, and bay leaves in a large bowl.
2. Add the minced garlic to the mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Let the marinade sit for at least 30 minutes before using it on caribou.
